title: Route
description: A single route containing a set of legs from the origin to the destination with any specified waypoints.

summary.description: A short textual description for the route, suitable for naming and disambiguating the route from alternatives.

legs.description: Array of route legs, one for each segment between waypoints. A route with no waypoints will contain one leg.

waypoint_order.description: An array indicating the order of any waypoints in the calculated route. Waypoints may be reordered if the request was passed optimize:true.

warnings.description: Warnings to be displayed when showing the route
